market_summary: Global markets rallied on March 24, 2026, driven by easing US-Iran tensions. Indian benchmarks Nifty50 and BSE Sensex saw significant gains, while gold and silver prices fell over 3% on de-escalation hopes. Oil markets remain cautious as Iran denied direct talks, maintaining volatility.
art_highlight: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 begins its Preview Days tomorrow, March 25, featuring 240 galleries. New highlights include the 'Echoes' sector, the Asian debut of 'Zero 10' digital initiative, and an expanded program under Mami Kataoka's curatorial leadership.
